Name: ATK
Desc: Affects DMG dealt when casting skills.\nIncreases gradually as you progress through stages.

Name: Health
Desc: Character HP in battle. The battle is lost when HP reaches zero.\nIncreases gradually as you progress through stages.

Name: Fighting Will
Desc: Casting skills consumes Fighting Will.\nDuring battle, each point of Fighting Will grants 0.3% DMG Reduction, up to 40%.\nIn [Phantom Clash], only Fighting Will above 50 grants DMG Reduction.

Name: Initiative
Desc: Affects Parry success rate.\nWhen casting Parry Skills, every 1 point of Initiative increases DMG dealt by 0.6%.

Name: Hypersequence
Desc: Affects Counter success rate and Hypersequence gained when taking hits.
